title: Red Sea Diversions - Red Alert or Not?
section_path: Red Sea Diversions - Red Alert or Not?
section_path_text: Red Sea Diversions - Red Alert or Not?
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2024-12-12_jp9ste42lguvwp0bu45unyb7mxk5kr_img_rgb-color-brs-shipbrokers-monogram-l_ee79606c8e74.png
Back in early 2024 in Issue 110 of this publication, we introduced the VUCA (Volatility, Uncertainty, Complexity, and Ambiguity) concept. In our conclusion, we underlined the difficulty in finding a solution to the Red Sea diversions by stating that ‘unless there is a sudden change of heart by all affiliated parties in the Israel-Hamas conflict, any measures to mitigate the Red Sea crisis might be akin to an attempt to un-tie the proverbial Gordian Knot'. In a nutshell, we proposed that the Red Sea diversions should last, at the bare minimum, for the full length of this calendar year.
